label_source: Layer-1 shape code cmp,vp,vpc,naive = L,W,L,W: cmplog AND value_profile_cmplog BLOCK; value_profile AND naive RESOLVE. value_profile resolving alongside naive (and vpc blocking alongside cmplog) isolates the discriminator to the I2S stage: anti-synergy where I2SRandReplace hurts BOTH I2S-bearing arms. The independent test must show I2S-anti without re-reading the resolve pattern (G2).

hypotheses.label: I2S substitutes a fixed-offset structural literal (decoy) that pins the loser corpus to the valid-structure path and away from the winner's free-byte target

params.note: decoy = the structural literal I2S copies in (sfnt header 00 01 00 00 + GSUB/GPOS/MATH FOURCCs at offset 0x0c for 5323/5353; Hebrew mark codepoints e.g. 0x05B7/0x05BC for 5784). target = the winner's free leading-byte / fall-through bytes. KEEP VERBATIM (prior-confirmed >=1 branch). NOTE for arbiter: branches 5664/5968/6253 (formerly parked in i2s_no_operand_budget_drain) ALSO score under this rule and were confirmed by it — they are decoy-substitution members in fact, not budget-drain; the prior author's pessimism about their fixed-offset operand was wrong.

hypotheses.prediction: On the I2S-bearing (cmplog/vpc) corpus vs naive corpus, the decoy structural literal is ENRICHED (decoy_enrich > 0) while the winner-target byte is DEPLETED (signed_target_enrich < 0). A pro-I2S 'magic-gate' alternative would predict the opposite (signed_target_enrich > 0, the I2S arm enriches the gate-satisfying byte). A no-effect/random alternative predicts signed_target_enrich ~ 0. So a clearly NEGATIVE signed enrichment falsifiably picks anti-decoy-substitution over both.

hypotheses.label: I2S operand substitution collapses corpus composition onto a few CMP-matched byte patterns, inflating/homogenizing the I2S-arm corpus so it cannot build the diverse runtime state (linked-list population) the structural predicate needs

params.note: NEW descriptor. corpus_size_ratio = median saved-corpus size of the I2S arm (cmplog/vpc) / non-I2S arm (naive/value_profile) per trial. composition_entropy_ratio = byte-value Shannon entropy of the I2S arm corpus / non-I2S arm corpus (homogenization => I2S arm collapses onto few values => ratio < 1). openthread HAS an on-disk corpus (data_realities). The repetitive '5c 78 30 30' run cited for 13302 is the homogenization signature. KEEP VERBATIM (prior-confirmed). NOTE: openthread/13300 and 13302 are flagged manual_demote (stateful LinkedList op, decoy_enrich~0.08) — this hypothesis is retained as the standing mechanism for the homogenization subtype; the arbiter honors the manual demotion for those two branches.

hypotheses.prediction: The I2S arm's corpus is inflated AND its byte-composition entropy is collapsed relative to the non-I2S arm (corpus_size_ratio >= 1.3 AND composition_entropy_ratio < 0.85). A 'no homogenization' alternative (I2S merely slower) predicts comparable composition entropy (ratio ~ 1) — so a LOW entropy ratio falsifiably distinguishes homogenization from generic slowness. G2-clean: it reads corpus composition, never the resolve pattern.

hypotheses.label: Gate is an EXACT-equality test against a short codepoint literal that the WINNER (non-I2S) corpus lands by free havoc byte mutation, while the I2S stage diverts mutation energy away from the literal so the I2S-arm corpus stalls FARTHER from it in Hamming distance

params.note: GENUINELY NEW mechanism (untried here). The gate `u == 0x0E0Eu || u == 0x0E0Fu` is a fixed exact value — not a fixed-OFFSET byte literal (the codepoint can appear at any read offset, so operand_enrichment is blind), so value_distance_reached is the right tool: it slides a 2-byte window across each arm's seeds and takes the MIN Hamming distance to the operand. Discriminator here is which ARM lands closer (winner_closer over winner=naive/vp vs loser=cmplog/vpc), NOT vp-vs-cmplog. CAVEAT: width=2 triggers the short-operand chance-alignment flag; we therefore require BOTH a winner-reaches-zero AND a clear gap (not just winner_closer) so chance alignment of the loser doesn't mask the effect. harfbuzz has an on-disk corpus + DB seeds for this rep (data_realities OK).

hypotheses.prediction: The WINNER arm (naive/value_profile) corpus contains a 2-byte window at Hamming distance ~0 to 0x0E0E/0x0E0F (it actually lands the literal), while the LOSER arm (cmplog/vpc) stalls at a strictly larger min distance (distance_gap > 0 with winner_closer=true). This rules out the NULL alternative 'I2S has no effect, both arms equally close' (which predicts distance_gap ~ 0) and the PRO-I2S alternative 'I2S substitutes the codepoint and gets the loser closer' (which predicts winner_closer=false / loser nearer). A genuinely NEGATIVE gap (loser farther) falsifiably isolates I2S-anti energy-diversion away from a free-byte literal. G2-clean: corpus Hamming distance to a literal is independent of the resolve outcome (a corpus can be close yet block, or far yet resolve).
hypotheses.rule: winner_closer == true AND distance_gap >= 0.25 AND naive_min_distance <= 0.0

hypotheses.label: Gate is a table-/state-machine-derived, mask/range, or shaper-category value with NO fixed-offset input-byte CMP operand and NO exact value literal; I2S substitution finds nothing to copy and its overhead dilutes the havoc budget that would otherwise land the codepoint/category by random exploration

params.note: 5619 = mask/range test (u & ~0xFF)==0x0E00 on a derived Unicode codepoint (byte_signature single_byte, dispersed — the target 0x0e byte has no fixed gate offset). 5989 = USE shaper halant category (use_category()==USE(H)/HVM/IS) assigned by harfbuzz machine-class TABLES from glyph properties — no input-byte literal at all. Neither has a fixed-offset literal (operand_enrichment returns no_gate_signature) NOR an exact value literal value_distance_reached could target. There is no POSITIVE corpus signature of 'budget drain' measurable from a per-branch signature — only the absence of an operand signal — and any depth/reach test would trivially read the resolve pattern (every anti branch has winner-reaches/loser-doesn't), violating G2. Per G3 we do NOT assert a mechanism on absence-of-evidence.

hypotheses.prediction: operand_enrichment returns no_gate_signature OR signed_target_enrich ~ 0; no built measurement yields a POSITIVE, G2-independent signature that distinguishes 'budget drain on a non-operand gate' from the null/underpowered case. Honest inconclusive.

hypotheses.label: Branch carries no comparison operand (presence/non-null gate reached by generic table/loop traversal); the I2S stage's operand substitution diverts the loser into an EXPENSIVE SIBLING subtree (deep GPOS sanitize/coverage paths) the winner never enters, so the loser never reaches the gate

params.note: The distinguishing evidence (card 5576: loser-ONLY invocation of GPOSProxy::GPOSProxy 0-vs-189, PairPosFormat1_3::sanitize 0-vs-49, Mark*PosFormat1_2 sanitize, all W=0/L>0) is the execution count of SIBLING diversion functions, not of the branch line itself. depth_reach is BRANCH-LINE scoped: at line 1989 it would only show winner-reaches / loser-doesn't, which is the resolve pattern restated (G2 violation), NOT the diversion signature. No BUILT tool measures per-function sibling-subtree execution divergence between W and L seed sets. Building such a descriptor is feasible in principle but speculative for a single branch; per G3 we keep this honestly inconclusive rather than invent the measurement. decidable:false.

hypotheses.prediction: Would predict loser-blocking seeds invoke the deep GPOS sanitize functions (PairPosFormat1_3::sanitize etc.) at high count while winner-resolving seeds invoke them ~0 — but NO built tool measures sibling-subtree invocation, and the only built reach tool (depth_reach) reads the branch line itself (= resolve pattern, G2-fail). UNMEASURABLE with current tools. Falls to inconclusive.

hypotheses.label: I2S (and ctx) anchor the corpus to large valid-header inputs; the branch needs an input shorter than a 128-byte minimum that only plain havoc byte-deletion produces

params.note: The mechanism (I2S arm holds LONGER seeds, winner needs < 128-byte truncation) is in principle seed-length measurable, BUT lcms has NO on-disk corpus on the s4 server (data_realities: corpora exist ONLY for curl, harfbuzz, openthread, sqlite3 on s4 / lcms,libxml2,libpng,bloaty on sB). CROSS-SERVER NOTE: lcms is a server-B target — server B DOES have the lcms corpus and CAN arbitrate this branch with median_seed_length_ratio. The test is left valid (not deleted) so the owning server can score it; it is only undecidable on the server that lacks the corpus, which is a data-availability matter, not a mechanism gap.

hypotheses.prediction: Would predict median_seed_length(I2S arm) >> median_seed_length(naive arm) and naive winners below the 128-byte header minimum. Decidable on the corpus-owning server (B). On s4 (no lcms corpus) it falls to inconclusive by data availability, NOT by mechanism non-discriminability.

notes:
ROUND-1 RE-DESIGN (loop-until-dry). SUPERSET/MONOTONIC: both prior-confirmed (KEEP) hypotheses are carried VERBATIM — i2s_decoy_substitution_overfit (rule signed_target_enrich<-0.3) and i2s_homogenizes_corpus_starves_state_diversity (rule corpus_size_ratio>=1.3 AND composition_entropy_ratio<0.85) — so the 6 confirmed decoy branches and the homogenization subtype re-validate unchanged. The arbiter's reality: of the 13 decisive branches the decoy rule actually confirmed 6 (the explicit 5323/5353/5784 PLUS 5664/5968/6253, which the r0 author had wrongly parked in budget-drain:decidable=false; they carry a fixed-offset FOURCC decoy after all and score under operand_enrichment). My 5 rule_not_met targets are lcms/2149, harfbuzz/5576, 5619, 5958, 5989; openthread/13300+13302 are manual_demote and left for the arbiter.

NEW DECIDABLE LABEL (1): i2s_diverts_from_exact_codepoint_literal for harfbuzz/5958_h0. This is a GENUINELY DIFFERENT mechanism than decoy-substitution (which needs a fixed-OFFSET structural literal) and than budget-drain (no literal at all): 5958's gate is an EXACT-value equality `u==0x0E0E||0x0E0F`, a free-position codepoint the WINNER lands by havoc but the I2S stage diverts AWAY from. value_distance_reached (untried here) measures min Hamming distance of each arm's corpus to that literal — G2-independent of the resolve pattern. Rule requires winner reaches distance 0 AND a clear loser gap, guarding the width=2 chance-alignment caveat. G1: rules out both the null (gap~0) and pro-I2S (loser closer) alternatives.

HONEST decidable:false (G3): (a) i2s_no_operand_budget_drain now holds ONLY 5619 (mask/range on derived codepoint, dispersed single byte, no fixed offset) and 5989 (USE shaper TABLE-derived halant category, no input literal at all) — neither has a fixed-offset literal (operand_enrichment blind) nor an exact value literal (value_distance_reached blind), and the only other reach signal would re-read the resolve pattern (G2 violation). No positive, independent signature exists, so per G3 they stay inconclusive. (b) i2s_off_path_subtree_diversion (harfbuzz/5576): the real discriminating evidence is loser-only invocation of deep GPOS sanitize SIBLING functions (W=0/L>0) — that is sibling-subtree execution divergence, which NO built tool measures; depth_reach is branch-line scoped (would just restate resolve = G2-fail). Kept as a NAMED honest-inconclusive (distinct from generic drain) rather than inventing a speculative single-branch descriptor. (c) i2s_anchors_large_valid_blocks_truncation (lcms/2149): seed-length measurable in principle but lcms has no corpus on s4 — CROSS-SERVER: server B owns lcms and can score median_seed_length_ratio; left valid so the owning server arbitrates, undecidable only by data availability, not mechanism.

MERGE/COLLAPSE rationale: r0 lumped 5664/5968/6253 + 5958_h0 + 5576 + 5619 + 5989 all into one budget-drain:false bucket. The arbiter showed 5664/5968/6253 are really decoy members; I further SPLIT OUT 5958_h0 (now decidable via value_distance) and NAMED 5576's off-path-diversion separately (distinct mechanism, honestly unmeasurable) — leaving budget-drain as the genuinely-non-discriminable {5619,5989}. Fewer, sharper hypotheses; every split is backed by a different measurement or an explicit no-tool admission.

data_realities respected: no seed_lineage 'I2S event' (I2S untagged); no byte-alignment on different-sized structural seeds; value_distance_reached scoped to harfbuzz (on-disk corpus + DB seeds); corpus/seed tests scoped to corpus-bearing targets; lcms deferred to its owning server; value_profile treated as a feedback (its effect read via corpus value-distance, never a lineage gradient event).
